name: upload_asset
description: Upload an image, video, or raw file to Cloudinary. You can upload from a URL, a local file path, or a base64-encoded string. Supports eager transformations applied at upload time.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The file to upload: a URL, base64 data URI, or local file path.

parameters.name: upload_preset
parameters.description: An upload preset defining default upload options. Required for unsigned uploads.

parameters.name: public_id
parameters.description: Custom public ID for the asset. Auto-generated if omitted.

parameters.name: folder
parameters.description: Folder path to store the asset in.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated tags to assign to the asset.

parameters.name: resource_type
parameters.description: The resource type: image, video, or raw. Defaults to image.
